items.title: Halloween in Philly: The Night Notre Dame Survived
items.summary: There are games you remember because everything went right. Notre Dame’s Halloween night trip to Philadelphia in 2015 was not one of them. The No. 9 Irish arrived at Lincoln Financial Field on October 31 carrying a 6-1 record and legitimate College Football Playoff aspirations. Waiting for them was one of the best stories of […]
